name: list_contract_types
title: List contract types
description: List all contract and legal document types Pactlio can generate, with descriptions, use cases, and USD prices. Start here to find the right contract type slug/id for other tools.

name: get_jurisdiction_requirements
title: Get jurisdiction-specific contract requirements
description: Statute-cited legal requirements, key differences, common pitfalls, terminology, and FAQs for a contract type in a specific US state or country. Use contract slug (e.g. "contractor-agreement") + jurisdiction slug (e.g. "california", "us", "uk", "eu-gdpr").

name: check_non_compete_enforceability
title: Check non-compete enforceability by US state
description: Whether a non-compete agreement is enforceable, limited, or void in a given US state (or DC), with salary thresholds and the key statute. Data covers all 50 states + DC.

state.description: US state name or slug, e.g. "California" or "california"

name: get_intake_questions
title: Get intake questions for a contract type
description: The questions Pactlio asks to draft a specific contract type — use these to collect the information needed before calling start_contract_draft. Returns fields, types, options, and validation rules.

contract_type.description: Contract type id from list_contract_types, e.g. "nda_mutual", "contractor_agreement"

name: start_contract_draft
title: Start drafting a contract (free preview)
description: Start generating a contract draft with Pactlio's multi-agent AI engine (drafter, critic, compliance checker). Takes 3-5 minutes — returns a preview_id immediately; poll get_draft_status. Free preview shows the opening sections; the full contract is unlocked by a human via checkout. Provide deal_summary fields collected via get_intake_questions (at minimum: parties, plus the required fields for the contract type).

deal_summary.description: Answers keyed by field name from get_intake_questions, e.g. {"parties":{"you":"Acme Inc","other":"Jane Doe"},"customFields":{...}}

name: get_draft_status
title: Get contract draft status / preview
description: Check a contract draft started with start_contract_draft. While generating returns status "pending". When complete, returns the free preview (opening sections), the titles of locked sections, and the URL where a human can pay to unlock the full contract.

name: get_checkout_link
title: Get checkout link for a drafted contract
description: Returns the URL where a human can view the preview and pay to unlock the full contract for a draft created with start_contract_draft. Share this link with your user.

name: analyze_contract
title: Analyze a contract for risks and red flags
description: Paste contract text and get an AI risk analysis: red flags, one-sided clauses, missing protections, and questions to ask. Free (2/day). Not legal advice.

contract_text.description: The contract text to analyze (200 to 50,000 characters)
